content.text: DONE Built DotAlignment.svelte: an amber probe arrow on a circular dial (drag or arrow-key slider, 0-360deg, step 5), four periwinkle candidate arrows fixed at 20/70/110/160deg labeled at their tips, and four lilac score bars beneath with mono readouts computed live as cos(probe - candidate angle), rising above and dropping below a zero baseline with sign, and the best-aligned candidate's column brought to full opacity while others recede.
